message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam actorFontColor #000000
skinparam actorBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam actorBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowThickness 2
skinparam lifelineColor #000000
skinparam lifelineThickness 1

actor Developer
participant "Vercel Build Machine" as VBM
participant "CMS" as CMS
participant "Vercel Production Machine" as VPM

Developer -> VBM: Git push
VBM -> VBM: Compile

frame "Collecting page data" {
    VBM -> CMS: Fetch content data
    CMS --> VBM: Return content data
}

VBM -> VBM: Generate static pages
VBM -> VPM: Upload build output
VPM -> VPM: Deploy

Developer -> Developer
@enduml
